pipeline_status.poller: normal — no new dome site changes detected this run
pipeline_status.analyst: 1 expansion (EXP-161) completed and integrated this run; 1 proposal processed (ISS-977-resolution)
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 18 pending reviews processed; 2 critical, 7 major, 8 moderate, 1 minor; many critical/major already fixed in current data

internal_issues.description: SEC-7.1 paragraph 4: v22 quote over-loaded; AE projection not shown inline. EXP-161 integrated.
W019 verdict standard_physics should be falsified — dome author conceded directional claim failed (REFINED status, lateral drift 5.5x poleward)
W020 verdict unfalsifiable should be falsified — prediction specified ≥3% threshold, author conceded failure (REFINED), but detail_reasoning incorrectly says 'no clear test criterion'
PRED-NEW-002 verdict unfalsifiable should be standard_physics — 9.2 km/s falls within P-wave range 8-13 km/s, IS testable

Part 1 scorecard sublabel 'None produces a prediction that both derives from dome geometry AND differs from standard physics' may not accurately reflect our verdict criteria; zero count may be defensible but criterion needs tightening
EXISTING: eg-verdicts section uses range '(045–051)' implying 7 WINs when only 5 are tidal — confirmed still present in generate-html.js

Already fixed — part2 section now uses 'dielectric pressure with aetheric density variation'

previously_flagged_as_critical_but_alrea.issue: Dangling sentence fragment and ~0.04° refraction unit error
previously_flagged_as_critical_but_alrea.status: Already fixed — current detail_evidence has no dangling fragment and uses Section 1.8 cascade argument instead of specific refraction figure

previously_flagged_as_critical_but_alrea.issue: Section 1.5 stale 'r=14,105 km, n≈1.83' vs corrected r≈10,008 km, n≈1.44
previously_flagged_as_critical_but_alrea.status: Already fixed — all section 1.x now consistently use r≈10,008 km, n≈1.44

expansion_integration.details: SEC-7.1 paragraph 4 replaced: v22 quote scoped correctly; AE projection r=17,791 km shown inline; Finsler-metric defense pre-empted; projection-independence of rim argument stated. Closed ISS-977.

recommended_actions.action: Human review needed: ISS-978 (W019→falsified), ISS-979 (W020→falsified), ISS-980 (PRED-NEW-002→standard_physics). Verdict-change patch file at monitor/decisions/suggested-patches-2026-04-14T13-25.json. These three verdict changes are well-supported by curmudgeon analysis and dome author's own REFINED concessions.

ISS-975 (eg-verdicts 045–051 range): generate-html.js needs '(045–051)' changed to explicit list 'Five tidal WINs (045, 046, 049, 050, 051)'. Infrastructure file — needs human edit of build-scripts/generate-html.js.

ISS-981 (part1-scorecard sublabel): Rewrite sublabel so criterion matches hardcoded count 0. Curmudgeon suggestion: 'None produces a dome-derived prediction that both (a) can be independently verified and (b) contradicts standard-model expectations.' Needs human review of the criterion's match with actual code_analysis data.
